calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2017 Continued To Oct-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S Order Taking Off Calendar Deft'S Motion For Change Of Venue [Not The Proper Court]; Declaration Of Louise Ann Baker-Davis; Exh. A; Declaration Of Diana Sanford; Exhs. 1-4 [Ccp 1008]; [Proposed] Order; Request To Appear At The Hearing By Telephone
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Louise Baker-Davis (909-797-7707) for Defendant/Moving party in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LOUISE BAKER-DAVIS' Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S Order Taking Off Calendar Defendant's Motion For Change Of Venue [Not The Proper Court].

Defendant Louise Baker-Davis' motion for reconsideration of the order taking her motion for change of Venue off calendar is granted. Ms. Baker-Davis has shown that she served plaintiff Enya Baker with the motion papers on her motion for change of venue and thus, since that motion was unopposed, it should have been granted. The court is not able to determine which court Ms. Baker-Davis requested that that this case be transferred to. (as fully reported on the Reporter's transcript) Order is signed. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue(Not The Propoer Court
Off Calendar Jul-17-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Enya Baker (415-571-3404) Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other Appearances.

RULING - Plaintiff does not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LOUISE BAKER-DAVIS' Motion For Change Of Venue is OFF CALENDAR without prejudice to being re-filed. Ms. Baker-Davis failed to file or provide a courtesy copy of a proof of service that shows that the motion was served on the plaintiff Enya Baker. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
